name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions and hardens an Nginx reverse proxy serving three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local) with self-signed TLS certificates, HTTP→HTTPS redirects, HSTS, security response headers, UFW firewall management, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, and sysctl kernel hardening.

name: cache
description: Installs and configures both Memcached (via the community cookbook) and Redis (via the redisio community cookbook) with password-based authentication, including a post-install Ruby block workaround to strip deprecated Redis configuration directives from the generated config file.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs an end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from a public GitHub repository, including PostgreSQL database setup, Python virtual environment creation, pip dependency installation, plaintext .env credential file generation, and systemd service management via uvicorn.
